reviews.review_description:
CONS: Very original + Easy and fun to play + All little worlds are connected with a map so you don't get lost + Adjusted difficult + Different habilities + It comes better as you progress

CONS: Sometimes little worlds appear out of boundary (although i had scanned the room correctly) but you can fit it quickly + A bit short

I absolutely love this game, but some of the levels are a bit challenging. I've been on YouTube looking for one and they all end after the first chapter....I need more than the first chapter.... otherwise great game please create more like this

reviews.review_title: Great game, but I need a hint
reviews.review_description:
My girlfriend and I love this game. We are in chapter 3 and the character ￼ says to lure ￼￼ the darkness into the trap. We have no clue as to what the trap is. Is there anybody who can give us a hint or tell us what it is? We would much appreciate it.
Thank you for your time.
Michael.

If you buy one game for the quest it's this game, the way each level appears in your room amazes me every time, it's a puzzle game so you have to figure each level out to get to the next but it's the one game I have to have a go on every day, it is visually stunning and it shows what great things can be done with vr,
 I swear someone should do a walk-through because some of the levels are soooo hard 😂 but so enjoyable to play.

Get this game, you won't be sorry.

reviews.review_title: Good but short. Not bad, not great.
reviews.review_description: I got this because people were comparing it to Moss. It's nowhere near as good as Moss, and the similarities line up only in that you play in 1st and 3rd person, and there's a storyline. However, it is not as difficult as Moss, and it only took about 2 1/2 hours to finish the game entirely. It is a good enough game with nice graphics, and it is an interesting play with the use of mixed reality. It does not take a long time to complete or have a compelling enough story to replay multiple times. And due to the fact it's mixed reality, you can't just sit down and play at any point, which isn't the best (and most likey while the game isn't very long). I am still giving 4 stars because it is a good game and was well done, just not very difficult, very short, and I'm not sure the re-play factor is there.

I was skeptical with this one, but after playing the 1st two chapters I'm sold. MR has real potential. Playing a 3D game while also being fully aware of my surroundings is amazing. Really look forward to seeing this medium evolve.

reviews.review_title: Just a bad copy of moss
reviews.review_description: The game has so much potential but the physics need a lot of refining, the various parts of terrain will spawn in random parts of the room, even inside a table that's been marked during space setup and the whole experience is just extremely laggy

The spaceship crashes, and absolutely nothing happens…


I don’t know how it suddenly started working, but it did!

I have finished this game & have thoroughly enjoyed every moment of it. It was full of amazing surprise's & not too challenging, I only got stuck a couple of times but not for long, I did work out the next step. I love the mixed reality  & how it fills your whole room. The character who you pilot is bossy but comical at the same time, made me laugh. I really enjoyed playing this  & wish it was longer. I hope more chapters of this game are made, as I would love to play more of it. Thank you for a brilliant game.

Such a cool concept for mixed reality reminded me a lot of astro-bot on psvr. Had a little bit of a struggle getting it setup but now it works great im able to walk around the house freely without hitting boundaries and play the game effortlessly! Thank you for this awesome game

reviews.review_title: The reviews here are Wrong, read....
reviews.review_description:
First of all, to many people here are just to quick to get videos out and not actually play the game properly. All these people saying it goes out of bounds... YES it Does, BUT... you can MOVE the islands to wherever you want them.
The game is good, I'm actually just writing up my review now for my channel... it will be uploaded sometime in the next 24 hours, so search for Gotcha VR, Sub and click that bell to be notified.

Great job on the game guys, maybe just add some instructions at the beginning of the game to help stop all this 'out of boundries' issues.

developer_response.body:
Hello GotchaVR! 

Many thanks for your feedback! 

The level generation outside the boundaries happens when your guardian is smaller than your room declaration. We are currently working hard on an update meanwhile we do not advise you to expand your guardian to at least the same size as your room declaration BUT it will temporarily fix the level generation and will allow you to have the best of the Demeter experience! 

Please keep us informed if you have any other issues. Have a good game!

reviews.review_description: Great and super fun game
This is a must have in Mixed Reality I hope to see more games like this one it’s really fun 🤩
When I first saw Atlanta running in my own living room, I was impressed. From that day on she became my good friend. I can’t go to bed, before I help her a little. This game is just fun all the way.

developer_response.body:
Hello! 

Many thanks for the lovely feedback!

reviews.review_description: This is very immersive and somewhat challenging!
Demeter was launched with some critical bugs. These have seemed to be resolved and the game is working better. Interesting implementation of AR.
Very good game try it

This game was brilliant when I first got it on meta quest 2 and now that has all changed after not playing it for about a week.
I have found it impossible to play everything in the game facing the wrong direction and very far away and you are not able to move or even see your character.

developer_response.body:
Hello Salutethedead1980,
 
We have just released an update for the game. 
It should fix (many) issues, you can find the full patch notes on the store page. 
Don't hesitate to update your game and let us know if you encounter any problems OR if it's all good!
 
Cheers! 
The Demeter Team

reviews.review_title: Can’t get i to first level??
reviews.review_description:
I have tried this multiple times, game loops after initial spacecraft crashes.
Quest 3, 512Gb, seems to crash below the floor level then doesn’t matter what I do, nothing happens?
I would prefer a fix i stead of a refund, i will change review if fixed 😀

developer_response.body:
Hello ReamerKT,
 
We have just released an update for the game. 
It should fix (many) issues, you can find the full patch notes on the store page.

reviews.review_description:
I'm sure this game could be fun. It keeps putting islands on my couch. But my couch isn't part of my play space, so I can't see where the character is. If you move your head to look, it restarts.

Constantly moving islands 'into' my play space. Its a good concept, but not for me

developer_response.body:
Hello, 

Many thanks for your feedback. 

If your couch is in your guardian then it's taken into account as a game space by the game. 
We are currently working hard on an update!

 Please keep us informed if you have any other issues. Have a good game!
